eventMetadata.context_description: Roma's home dominance at the Olimpico, where they've won their last four Serie A matches, anchors trader consensus for player props favoring their attackers like Paulo Dybala and new signing Artem Dovbyk, with implied probabilities high for anytime goals and shots on target. Dybala's recent return from minor injury boosts his scoring odds after three goals in five games, while Lecce's defense concedes 2.2 goals per away match amid their six-game winless streak. Lecce's Roberto Piccoli remains a threat for overs on shots, but Roma's midfield control via Lorenzo Pellegrini limits counters. Official lineups confirm Evan Ndicka suspended for Roma, potentially exposing flanks, yet recent 3-0 thrashing of Venezia signals offensive momentum ahead of this mid-table clash.

events.title: Atalanta BC vs. Hellas Verona FC - Player Props
events.description: Goal scorers for the Serie A game between Atalanta BC and Hellas Verona FC, scheduled for March 22, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Atalanta's Ademola Lookman remains sidelined with a muscle injury, confirmed by coach Gianluca Gasperini, shifting trader consensus toward reduced props on his goals or shots despite the Bergamaschi's scorching form—unbeaten in 10 Serie A matches and topping the table. Home dominance and Atalanta's 17-3 shot edge in recent head-to-heads underpin implied probabilities favoring Bergamo shooters.

events.title: Atalanta BC vs. Hellas Verona FC - Player Props
